ingredients.item: ½ cup (25 g) chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ½ cup (25 g) chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: ½ cup (30 g) chopped green onions
ingredients.original: ½ cup (30 g) chopped green onions

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil, plus more if needed

ingredients.item:
MINT YOGURT SAUCE (OPTIONAL)
½ cup (120 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
1 tablespoon mayonnaise
ingredients.original:
MINT YOGURT SAUCE (OPTIONAL)
½ cup (120 ml) plain, whole-milk yogurt
1 tablespoon mayonnaise

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE CAULIFLOWER FRITTERS: Place 1 or 2 inches (2.5 to 5 cm) of water in a small pot and place a steamer basket inside; bring the water to a boil. Place the cauliflower florets in the steamer basket, cover, and cook until tender, 4 to 8 minutes depending on the size of the florets. (You can also steam the cauliflower in a microwave using a microwave steamer basket.)
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE CAULIFLOWER FRITTERS: Place 1 or 2 inches (2.5 to 5 cm) of water in a small pot and place a steamer basket inside; bring the water to a boil. Place the cauliflower florets in the steamer basket, cover, and cook until tender, 4 to 8 minutes depending on the size of the florets. (You can also steam the cauliflower in a microwave using a microwave steamer basket.)

ingredients.item: 2 Transfer the steamed cauliflower to a large bowl. Lightly mash it using a potato masher until the florets are broken down but not overly mushy.
ingredients.original: 2 Transfer the steamed cauliflower to a large bowl. Lightly mash it using a potato masher until the florets are broken down but not overly mushy.

ingredients.item: 3 Add the potato, parsley, green onions, beaten eggs, curry powder, coriander, 2 teaspoons salt, ½ teaspoon pepper, and flour. Mix well using a spoon or your hands until all the ingredients are combined.
ingredients.original: 3 Add the potato, parsley, green onions, beaten eggs, curry powder, coriander, 2 teaspoons salt, ½ teaspoon pepper, and flour. Mix well using a spoon or your hands until all the ingredients are combined.

ingredients.item: 4 In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Place a heaping spoonful of fritter batter into the hot oil and gently flatten it into a rough circular shape. Continue spooning the fritters in to cover the surface of the skillet without overcrowding. Shallow-fry each side for 1 to 2 minutes, until golden and crispy. Transfer to a paper towel–lined plate to absorb excess oil. (You may need to add more oil until all the fritter batter is cooked.)
ingredients.original: 4 In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Place a heaping spoonful of fritter batter into the hot oil and gently flatten it into a rough circular shape. Continue spooning the fritters in to cover the surface of the skillet without overcrowding. Shallow-fry each side for 1 to 2 minutes, until golden and crispy. Transfer to a paper towel–lined plate to absorb excess oil. (You may need to add more oil until all the fritter batter is cooked.)

ingredients.item: 5 TO MAKE THE MINT YOGURT SAUCE (OPTIONAL): In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, mint, ⅛ teaspoon pepper, and ¼ teaspoon salt until combined.
ingredients.original: 5 TO MAKE THE MINT YOGURT SAUCE (OPTIONAL): In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, mayonnaise, mint, ⅛ teaspoon pepper, and ¼ teaspoon salt until combined.

ingredients.item: 6 Serve the fritters with the sauce (if using) for dipping or into sandwiches.
ingredients.original: 6 Serve the fritters with the sauce (if using) for dipping or into sandwiches.
